# Active Context

## Current Focus

Complete independent QA for Increment 2 without promoting milestone readiness.

## Confirmed Facts

- Increment 1 is accepted.
- Increment 2 passed Validation and is waiting for QA.
- The milestone still contains accepted work and is not ready for release.

## Current Decisions

- Preserve the existing TypeScript service.
- Treat queue recovery as part of Increment 2.

## Unknowns

- Recovery behavior on a real browser storage failure still needs QA evidence.
